actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mammoth makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the mammoth moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

bonus_actions.name: Trample
bonus_actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. Failure: 29 (4d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Bruiser - Massive charging tank with trample ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses charge attacks to knock prone, then tramples fallen enemies
tactical_info.damage_output: 36 piercing + 29 bludgeoning per round with charge combo
tactical_info.key_abilities: Charge-prone combo, devastating trample on prone targets
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low DEX makes it vulnerable to ranged attacks and mobility spells
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for controlling large areas and devastating grouped enemies
